<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ class DsPairStub extends Stub { public function __construct(mixed $key, mixed $value) { $this->value = [ Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.'key' => $key, Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.'value' => $value, ]; } }
